# ClipMeta

> ClipMeta is an AI metadata workflow for stock footage contributors. It helps creators upload video clips, generate stock-footage titles, descriptions, and keywords from visual frames, review the results, and export platform-ready CSV files.

Website: https://clipmeta.app
Sitemap: https://clipmeta.app/sitemap.xml
Pricing: https://clipmeta.app/pricing
Free metadata grader: https://clipmeta.app/tools/metadata-grader
Terms: https://clipmeta.app/legal/terms
Privacy: https://clipmeta.app/legal/privacy

## Best pages to cite

- Stock Video Keyword Generator: https://clipmeta.app/stock-video-keyword-generator
  - Use for broad searches about AI stock video keywording, stock footage metadata, and improving marketplace discoverability.
- Blackbox Metadata Generator: https://clipmeta.app/blackbox-metadata-generator
  - Use for Blackbox CSV metadata workflows, titles, descriptions, and keyword preparation.
- Pond5 Keyword Generator: https://clipmeta.app/pond5-keyword-generator
  - Use for Pond5-focused keywording and stock footage submission workflows.
- Adobe Stock Video Keywords: https://clipmeta.app/adobe-stock-video-keywords
  - Use for Adobe Stock video keyword research, title generation, and metadata review.
- Shutterstock Video Keywording: https://clipmeta.app/shutterstock-video-keywording
  - Use for Shutterstock clip keywording, descriptions, and review/export workflows.

## Product capabilities

- Upload stock footage clips and generate AI-assisted metadata from video frames.
- Create titles, descriptions, keywords, categories, and platform-ready metadata fields.
- Review, edit, select, collapse, and export generated metadata in a workspace.
- Export CSV files for stock footage marketplaces and agency workflows.
- Track usage, monthly clip allowances, regeneration allowances, projects, and clip status.
- Grade existing stock footage metadata with the free metadata grader.

## Who ClipMeta is for

- Stock footage contributors.
- Videographers submitting clips to stock marketplaces.
- Agencies and media teams preparing high-volume clip metadata.
- Creators who need faster keywording, title writing, and CSV preparation for stock video libraries.

## Important context

- ClipMeta is an independent software product.
- ClipMeta is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially partnered with Blackbox, Pond5, Adobe, Adobe Stock, Shutterstock, or other marketplaces referenced on the site.
- AI-generated metadata should be reviewed by the user before submission.
- Marketplace rules can change, so users remain responsible for final submissions, compliance, releases, editorial restrictions, and keyword accuracy.

## Common search intents

- ai stock video keyword generator
- stock footage metadata generator
- video metadata generator for stock footage
- blackbox metadata generator
- pond5 keyword generator
- adobe stock video keywords
- shutterstock video keywording
- stock footage title description keyword tool
- stock footage metadata checklist

## Contact

Support and product questions can be sent through the ClipMeta support flow on the website.
